title: Manufacturing Engineer - EPC Industrie - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - EPC Industrie - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
EPC Industrie has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About EPC Industrie:
EPC Industrie is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
